title: 20Pcs Plasterboard Fixings, Plasterboard Wall Plugs and Screws Set, 10Pcs Self Drilling Drywall Anchors and 10Pcs Drywall Screws, Heavy Duty Metal Wall Anchors Kit
features: PREMUIM QUALITY ZINC ALLOY – This plasterboard wall plugs made of high-quality zinc alloy is of high strength, high scratch resistance and rush resistance. We use superior carbon steel for the galvanized screws set to ensure its strength. What’s more, the galvanized plasterboard screws are corrosion resistant, which makes their service life even longer
RACTICAL DESIGN FOR STABLE INSTALLATION - The threads cut deep into the material, providing a secure hold and pull-out resistant grip of the plasterboard wall and screw kit

EASY INSTALLATION WITH SCREWDRIVER – These plasterboard wall plugs feature sharp, pointed shanks that can be screwed into the wall without a pre-drilled hole by using a screwdriver or a screw gun, which produces less dust. Once the drywall anchor is in the wall, the plasterboard screw is inserted, the anchor will wedge tightly against the drywall

HEAVY DUTY & WIDE APPLICATION – The self-drilling plasterboard wall plug are recommended for medium-duty applications and are very easy to install. They are perfect for hanging bathroom and kitchen accessories, shelving, light fixtures, mirrors, picture frames, curtain rods and small decorative shelves, and more
PACKAGE – You will receive 10pcs metal 13*32mm drywall anchor and 10pcs 4.2*30mm drywall screws, total 20 pcs plasterboard fixings, a screwdriver bit is included
description: Product Description Increased Load-Bearing Capacity Regular screw kit directly inserted into drywall have weak load-bearing capacity and can easily slip out. Using plasterboard wall plugs and screws in zynthor plasterboard fixings significantly enhances the stability and load-bearing capacity of the mounted objects. Prevents Wall Damage & Reusable Using plasterboard wall plugs and screws helps to distribute the stress more evenly, reducing the likelihood of wall damage. Wall anchor in screw and anchor set can be reused after removal, providing economic and environmental benefits. Easy Installation Drywall anchor is designed for simplicity. Our self drilling anchor screws require no hole to be drilled or can be directly screwed into the drywall without the need for complex tools, making them ideal for DIY projects. Zinc alloy is durability and corrosion resistance. Wide Applicability Wide Applicability: Drywall screws and anchors are suitable for different wall materials and mounting needs, such as plastic anchors, and toggle bolts for drywall, stucco anchors, hollow door anchors, dresser anchors to wall. They can be used to mount picture frames, shelves, mirrors, TV brackets
